notes: Game starts and runs with 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 PROTON_NO_ESYNC=2 %command%' but unfortunately the graphic quality is far from satisfying. Videos stutter sometimes. On battlefield, colors are kind of psychodelic and woods and bushes seem to be only dark. Probably it needs some more tweaks, but it could also be open amd graphic driver to cause it.
title: Panzer Strategy
